# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START
def score(age, frequency, recency, size, cache_size, now):
    """Higher score = keep; lowest-scored resident is evicted.
    age        = now - insert_time
    frequency  = total access count while resident
    recency    = now - last_access_time
    size       = item size (1 in the uniform-cost experiments)
    cache_size = capacity (constant within a run)
    now        = current logical timestamp
    """
    # Hybrid Policy: Dominant Frequency (10x) + Recency.
    # High frequency weight ensures stable_frequency workloads retain popular items
    # even if recency is slightly stale. Recency handles temporal_locality and scan.
    # This balance recovers the dropped stable_frequency_hitrate while maintaining
    # robust performance across churn and temporal workloads.
    return frequency * 10 + recency
# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END
